coaching.phase1: Reply bait > like bait. Ask a question that can't be ignored. Post when your audience is active — first 6 hours are your entire window.
coaching.phase2: Reply to every comment in the first hour. One reply chain where you engage back = 150x a like algorithmically.
coaching.phase34: Links kill reach — put them in replies. Build bookmark-worthy content. Conversation depth is everything on X.
